name: Partnership Organizational Expense Deduction

eligibility.description: New partnerships with organizational costs. The $5,000 immediate deduction is phased out if total organizational expenses exceed $50,000.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A partnership can elect to deduct up to $5,000 of organizational expenses in the year it begins business, with the remainder amortized over 180 months.
